title: toddalia micrantha
intro: Toddalia micrantha, also known as the Chinese toddalia or Chinese bitter pepper, is a plant species in the Rutaceae family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiviral, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Toddalia micrantha include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and relieve pain, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional Chinese medicine. Toddalia micrantha can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, decoctions, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
